---
title: "Référentiels du médicament"
---


### BDPM {#bdpm .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://base-donnees-publique.medicaments.gouv.fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/bdpm.png" alt="BDPM">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://base-donnees-publique.medicaments.gouv.fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Base de Données Publique des Médicaments</a>
<div class="outil-source">
ANSM / HAS / CNAMTS
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```


### Drugs.com {#drugs .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.drugs.com/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/drugs.png" alt="Drugs.com">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.drugs.com/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Drugs.com</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Drugs.com
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```


### Theriaque {#theriaque .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.theriaque.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/theriaque.png" alt="Theriaque">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.theriaque.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Theriaque</a>
<div class="outil-source">
CNHIM
<br><span style="color: #E07B00;">Inscription requise</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```


### Vidal {#vidal .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.vidal.fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/vidal.png" alt="Vidal">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.vidal.fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Vidal</a>
<div class="outil-source">
VIDAL
<br><span style="color: #E07B00;">Accès partiel gratuit</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```


### Pharmacomedicale {#pharmacomedicale-cnpm .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.pharmacomedicale.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/pharmacomedicale.png" alt="Pharmacomedicale">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.pharmacomedicale.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Pharmacomédicale</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Collège National de Pharmacologie Médicale (CNPM)
<br><span style="color: #006B3D;">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
